description: This image displays the logo for the Land Monitoring Service. The logo features an icon on the left and text on the right, both rendered in shades of green on a white background. The icon is a stylized letter "L" formed by a bar chart-like graphic on the left, an ear of wheat on the right, all enclosed within a circular outline. To the right of the icon, the text "Land Monitoring Service" is displayed in two lines, with "Land" on the upper line and "Monitoring Service" on the lower line.
